---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the methodology, templates, or documentation
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## What you'd like to see

Describe the addition, change, or new template you're proposing.

## The problem it solves

What pain point or gap led you to suggest this? Concrete examples from your own projects help a lot. FSE was built from real problems, not theoretical ones, and that's how it grows.

## Where it would live

If you've thought about it, suggest where this fits — a new section in FSE.md, a new template, a new top-level document, etc.

## How it would work

If you can describe the proposed behavior, structure, or wording, include it here. Drafts are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why did you land on this one?

## Scope check

FSE is intentionally tool-agnostic and stack-agnostic at the core. Stack-specific patterns belong in fse-extensions. Tool-specific patterns (Claude prompts, Cursor configs, etc.) belong as optional addons, not core methodology. Does your suggestion fit the core scope, or does it belong in extensions or a separate addon?

## Anything else

Links, references, or examples from other methodologies that informed your thinking.
